dataFlows.transformKql:
source
| where recordType == 'event'
| extend
    HalcyonSourceTime = datetime(1970-01-01) + (tolong(record.['time']) * 1ms),
    HalcyonEventId = tostring(record.metadata.original_event_uid),
    activity_id = toint(record.activity_id),
    activity_name = tostring(record.activity_name),
    category_uid = toint(record.category_uid),
    category_name = tostring(record.category_name),
    class_uid = toint(record.class_uid),
    class_name = tostring(record.class_name),
    severity_id = toint(record.severity_id),
    severity = tostring(record.severity),
    type_uid = tolong(record.type_uid),
    type_name = tostring(record.type_name),
    message = tostring(record.message),
    raw_data = tostring(record.raw_data),
    raw_record = tostring(record),
    status_id = toint(record.status_id),
    status = tostring(record.status),
    action_id = toint(record.action_id),
    action = tostring(record.action),
    disposition_id = toint(record.disposition_id),
    disposition = tostring(record.disposition),
    rcode = tostring(record.rcode),
    rcode_id = toint(record.rcode_id),
    metadata = todynamic(record.metadata),
    unmapped = todynamic(record.unmapped),
    actor = todynamic(record.actor),
    device = todynamic(record.device),
    file = todynamic(record.file),
    process = todynamic(record.process),
    user = todynamic(record.['user']),
    dst_endpoint = todynamic(record.dst_endpoint),
    src_endpoint = todynamic(record.src_endpoint),
    traffic = todynamic(record.traffic),
    query = todynamic(record.['query']),
    answers = todynamic(record.answers),
    driver = todynamic(record.driver),
    module = todynamic(record.module),
    app = todynamic(record.app)
| project
    TimeGenerated, HalcyonSourceTime, HalcyonEventId, activity_id, activity_name, category_uid, category_name,
    class_uid, class_name, severity_id, severity, type_uid, type_name,
    message, raw_data, raw_record, status_id, status, action_id, action,
    disposition_id, disposition, rcode, rcode_id, metadata, unmapped,
    actor, device, file, process, user, dst_endpoint, src_endpoint, traffic,
    query, answers, driver, module, app

source
| where recordType == 'alert'
| extend
    HalcyonSourceTime = datetime(1970-01-01) + (tolong(record.['time']) * 1ms),
    HalcyonAlertId = tostring(record.finding_info.uid),
    activity_id = toint(record.activity_id),
    activity_name = tostring(record.activity_name),
    category_uid = toint(record.category_uid),
    category_name = tostring(record.category_name),
    class_uid = toint(record.class_uid),
    class_name = tostring(record.class_name),
    type_uid = tolong(record.type_uid),
    type_name = tostring(record.type_name),
    ['count'] = toint(record.['count']),
    severity_id = toint(record.severity_id),
    severity = tostring(record.severity),
    status_id = toint(record.status_id),
    status = tostring(record.status),
    message = tostring(record.message),
    raw_record = tostring(record),
    action_id = toint(record.action_id),
    action = tostring(record.action),
    disposition_id = toint(record.disposition_id),
    disposition = tostring(record.disposition),
    finding_info = todynamic(record.finding_info),
    metadata = todynamic(record.metadata),
    device = todynamic(record.device),
    resources = todynamic(record.resources),
    actor = todynamic(record.actor),
    observables = todynamic(record.observables),
    unmapped = todynamic(record.unmapped),
    comment = tostring(record.comment),
    evidences = todynamic(record.evidences)
| project
    TimeGenerated, HalcyonSourceTime, HalcyonAlertId, activity_id, activity_name,
    category_uid, category_name, class_uid, class_name, type_uid, type_name,
    ['count'], severity_id, severity, status_id, status, message, raw_record, action_id, action,
    disposition_id, disposition, finding_info, metadata, device, resources,
    actor, observables, unmapped, comment, evidences
